category_title: High-achieving Latino students who disassociate from academic labels through mischief
minimal_context: José is completing a pre-TAKS math drill worksheet in Ms. Kendall's fifth-grade classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Alright everyone, please complete the pre-TAKS math drill worksheet on your desks.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Scribbles answers rapidly down the page without reading the questions) Done! Hey Manuel, did you see how fast I finished?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: José, please check your work and stay quiet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I did check it. See? Behave good. Do my work with a great smile. (Grins exaggeratedly at the class and throws a crumpled piece of paper at another student's desk)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to sit in your seat and wait for the others to finish the math drill.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stands up and walks over to another desk) These drills are boring anyway. Hey, who's going to the Spaghetti Warehouse later? Watch this! (Starts balancing a pencil on his nose and making loud jokes to get the class laughing)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Alright everyone, please complete the pre-TAKS math drill worksheet on your desks.

STUDENT: (Scribbles answers rapidly down the page without reading the questions) Done! Hey Manuel, did you see how fast I finished?

TUTOR: José, please check your work and stay quiet.

STUDENT: I did check it. See? Behave good. Do my work with a great smile. (Grins exaggeratedly at the class and throws a crumpled piece of paper at another student's desk)

TUTOR: You need to sit in your seat and wait for the others to finish the math drill.

STUDENT: (Stands up and walks over to another desk) These drills are boring anyway. Hey, who's going to the Spaghetti Warehouse later? Watch this! (Starts balancing a pencil on his nose and making loud jokes to get the class laughing)

task.content: Completing math class work and pre-TAKS drill-n-kill activities

context.environment: Ms. Kendall's fifth grade math class

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When faced with routine drill-n-kill activities and wanting to visit with classmates
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Rushing through his class work in order to visit with his classmates, and engaging in travesuras (mischievous behaviors) that included teasing, joke telling, calling out, and acting out
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Doing a type of a cost-benefit analysis on which behaviors would have the bigger pay-off; engaging in mischief to keep the days of drill-n-kill activities more interesting
related_quotes: Behave good. Do my work with a great smile

behavior_patterns.condition: Before admitting to wanting to partake in academic or after-school activities
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Asked if the 'coolest' students were participating to clarify social risk
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Wanted to ensure there was minimal risk of being labeled a schoolboy
related_quotes: I don’t do any after-school stuff
